description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard or storage cabinet with a sleek, minimalist design. The exterior is finished in a dark, likely matte or semi-gloss color, and the cabinet stands on thin, metallic legs that elevate it slightly above the ground. The front features a combination of two doors on the left and two drawers on the right, providing both concealed and accessible storage options. The handles are subtle, integrated into the design for a streamlined appearance. The cabinet's construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with metal used for the legs and possibly the handles. Its overall aesthetic is contemporary, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or upscale residential spaces.
description: A sleek, dark-colored modern cabinet with two doors and two drawers, elevated on thin metal legs. Its minimalist design and integrated handles give it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors on the left and two drawers on the right, with thin metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel and the depth of the cabinet, with metal legs at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other solid side panel and metal legs.
